catalog.name: RAG Customer Service Chatbot Framework
catalog.description: A complete, production-ready framework for building a RAG-powered customer service chatbot. Includes PDF ingestion, Phi-3 Mini SLM inference, ChromaDB vector store, RAGAS evaluation pipeline, and a React web UI with streaming chat and an evaluation dashboard.
catalog.long_description: This framework enables teams to ingest PDF documents as a knowledge base, serve customer queries through a RAG pipeline backed by Phi-3 Mini, evaluate quality using RAGAS metrics, and access everything via a React web app. Built with Claude Code and the Claude Agent SDK.
features: Phi-3 Mini SLM with 4-bit quantization support
ChromaDB vector store with cosine similarity
RAGAS evaluation: Faithfulness, Relevancy, Precision, Recall, Correctness
React + TypeScript web UI with Tailwind CSS
Full evaluation dashboard with trend charts and per-question drill-down
Thumbs feedback collection and JSONL export for fine-tuning

changelog.notes: Initial release — full RAG pipeline, RAGAS evaluation, React UI.
